title: Video SEO vs. AEO: Understanding the Future of Search
excerpt: Discover the critical differences between Video SEO and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and why both are essential for digital dominance in 2026.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
Search is evolving rapidly. Traditional SEO focuses on ranking links, but Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is about being the definitive answer for AI-driven platforms like ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and Perplexity.

The Role of Video in AEO

Video content is uniquely positioned to answer complex questions quickly. By combining Video SEO (optimizing for YouTube and Google Video carousels) with AEO (structuring transcripts and metadata for AI understanding), you create a dual-threat content strategy.

Over the next two weeks, we will explore exactly how to leverage this combination to dominate search results across all platforms.
